hero.sub: We design and build bilingual websites — Arabic and English, mobile-first, made for how your customers actually browse, message, and book. One-time fee. You own the work.

what.headline: A small studio that builds the website your business deserves.
what.intro1: NASHR is a bilingual web design studio based in Riyadh. We build custom websites for Saudi businesses — restaurants, clinics, salons, contractors, professional services — that have been losing customers because they have no website, or a website that doesn't work hard enough for them.
what.intro2: We are not a large agency. We're a small team that cares about craft, and that means every site we ship is built from scratch around your business, your customers, and how Saudi Arabia actually buys in 2026.

how.headline: Six steps. No surprises. You stay in control the whole way.
chatPrompts: Hi — we don't really have a site. Customers can't find us. Where do we start?
Sounds good. How do we figure out what it should actually look like?
And the price — how does that part work?
Okay we're in. What do we sign and when do you start?
Can we make changes once we see the design?
And launching — what happens at the end?

steps.title: First contact
steps.body: A call, a WhatsApp message, an email, or a visit. Whichever way works for you. We listen first.

steps.title: Free mockup call
steps.body: We sit down — in person or on a call — walk through your business, and show you a free design mockup of what your site could look like. No payment, no commitment.

steps.title: Scope & estimate
steps.body: Once we both understand what you need, we confirm the scope and give you a clear price estimate. Custom — not a fixed package.

steps.title: Agreement & deposit
steps.body: We sign a short Letter of Engagement and you pay a 25% deposit. Work begins immediately.

steps.title: Build & revise
steps.body: We design, build, and refine. You get 2–4 rounds of revisions, included — no surprise charges, no nickel-and-diming.

steps.title: Launch & handover
steps.body: Final payment, full IP transfer to you, and we publish your site on a domain you own. The work is yours, forever.

help.headline: Everything your customers expect — in Arabic, in English, on every screen.
help.sub: Pick what you need. We'll tell you honestly what your business actually requires — not what makes our invoice bigger.

cards.title: Bilingual by default
cards.body: Real Arabic RTL and English LTR, with a one-tap toggle. Arabic-first — not Google-translated.

cards.title: Mobile-first build
cards.body: Designed for the screen most Saudi customers will use — the phone — then scaled up cleanly.

cards.title: Conversational
cards.body: One-tap WhatsApp on every page, plus an optional 24/7 AI assistant that answers FAQs, prices, and hours.

cards.title: Performance
cards.body: Sub-200ms server response, with the local SEO foundations to show up when customers search nearby.

cards.title: Durability
cards.body: SSL, secure static-first builds, and full IP transfer on final payment. Your site, your code, your future.

cards.title: Architecture
cards.body: Modern decoupled stack with direct integrations for booking (Cal.com or custom), team pages, and services.

contact.sub: Pick the channel you already use. We answer fast in both Arabic and English.

tiles.body: A 15-minute free consultation. We look at your business and tell you honestly what would help.
The fastest way. Send us a message, we usually reply within an hour during business hours.
Answer a few quick questions and we'll reply with the best next step.

modal.title: Start a brief
modal.sub: A few quick questions. Takes under 90 seconds.
